message:
test(fcp-core): pin PolicyPreviewDelta Display tokens

Adds `Display` (and a `pub const fn as_str(self)` helper) for
`PolicyPreviewDelta` — fcp-core's policy-change effect classifier carried
by `PolicyPreviewEntry::delta`. The four variants now stringify to their
stable operator-facing tokens:

  WouldAllow            → "would_allow"
  WouldDeny             → "would_deny"
  WouldRequireApproval  → "would_require_approval"
  ReasonChanged         → "reason_changed"

Extends the existing `policy_effect_display_serde_tag.rs` pin (which
previously only locked the serde scalar) with a `Display`-token-per-variant
table assertion that checks both `as_str()` and `to_string()` against
`POLICY_EFFECT_CASES`, so any drift between the two surfaces would fail
the pin.

Closes the in-progress half of flywheel_connectors-2icav (Pin fcp-core
PolicyEffect Display) — there is no type literally named `PolicyEffect`
in fcp-core; `PolicyPreviewDelta` is the exported analogue.
